text: ‘Storm the loop-hole’; literally, ‘fall through windows’, but the Hebrew text reads, ‘fall (or plunge) among weapons’.
Grammatically (if the text is sound) verses 15-17 imply a command; dramatically (as verses 18 and 19 shew) they imply that the command has been carried out.

‘Proof of your restoration to favour’, literally, ‘a teacher of justice’. Some would understand the Hebrew text as meaning, ‘winter rain to (produce) the restoration of your fortunes’. But it almost seems as if the prophet had made a deliberate play upon words: ‘He gives you a show-er of (the way to) restoration, makes the winter shower and the spring rain fall’.
